content.Text:
[Tue 2026-04-21 15:40 CDT] Update the BHBMW PMA Intelligence dashboard with real GA4 campaign data. The dashboard is at ~/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/bhbmw-pma-intelligence.html

## Add a new section: "BHBMW Current Ad Activity (Last 30 Days — GA4 Data)"

Place this section BETWEEN the competitor cards and the Galleria benchmark section.

Use a dark slate card with BMW blue (#1C69D4) accent. Label it clearly as "Source: GA4 Live Data — Last 30 Days"

### Google Ads Campaigns (J&L Marketing)
Show as a table with columns: Campaign Name | Sessions | Conversions

| Campaign | Sessions | Conv |
|----------|----------|------|
| SEM Brand | 1,021 | 77 |
| Service - Attack - In-Market Search Keywords | 1,466 | 1 |
| Service - Attack - Competitor Remarketing | 1,067 | 2 |
| SEM Locations | 96 | 7 |
| Service - Attack - Service Offers | 125 | 0 |
| Display In-Market | 5 | 0 |
| Service - Defend - Customer List | 44 | 0 |
| Service - Defend - Previous Customers | 9 | 0 |

Below the table, add a callout box in amber/yellow:
⚠️ "J&L campaign mix is heavily service-focused. No active new vehicle sales campaigns detected in GA4 data."

### Meta / Social Traffic
Show as a simple stat block:
- Facebook referral traffic (organic page): 67 sessions
- J&L "aftersales" tagged Meta campaign: 15 sessions
- Total paid Meta sessions: ~15
- Active Meta ad campaigns detected: 0

Below, add a callout in red:
🚨 "Zero active paid Meta campaigns. Mercedes-Benz BR is running 250 active Meta ads. This is the single biggest gap in the BHBMW digital footprint."

### Top Traffic Sources Overall
Show top 5 as a simple ranked list:
1. Google Organic — 5,300 sessions
2. Direct — 5,236 sessions  
3. Google CPC (untagged) — 4,090 sessions
4. Google CPC Brand — 1,021 sessions
5. VinSolutions (vinurl.com) — 544 sessions

## After editing, push to GitHub:
```bash
cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards
git add bhbmw-pma-intelligence.html
git commit -m "TAS: Add real GA4 campaign data to BHBMW PMA dashboard"
git push
```

Confirm push succeeded and report the live URL:
https://thecooperativeagency.github.io/Ga4-dashboards/bhbmw-pma-intelligence.html
I'll start by reading the current dashboard file.

Thinking.text:
I need to add a new section between the competitor cards (ending at line 520) and the Galleria benchmark section (starting at line 522). I also need to add CSS for the new section elements.

Let me craft the new section HTML and any needed CSS.

content.Text:
Push succeeded. The new GA4 campaign data section is live at:

**https://thecooperativeagency.github.io/Ga4-dashboards/bhbmw-pma-intelligence.html**

The new section sits between the competitor cards and the Galleria benchmark and includes:

- **Google Ads table** — all 8 J&L campaigns with sessions and conversions (SEM Brand leading at 1,021 sessions / 77 conversions)
- **Amber callout** — flagging the service-heavy campaign mix with no new vehicle sales campaigns
- **Meta/Social stat block** — showing 67 organic Facebook sessions, 15 paid Meta sessions, and 0 active campaigns
- **Red callout** — highlighting the 0 vs 250 Meta gap against Mercedes-Benz BR
- **Top 5 traffic sources** — ranked list from Google Organic (5,300) down to VinSolutions (544)
The file /Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/bhbmw-pma-intelligence.html has been updated successfully.
